output.final_deliverable:
Chain of pages (in order):
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_academic_disciplines
4. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academic_discipline

Verified adjacency (supported by provided evidence):
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page links to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents (Main Page visit result links_sample includes this URL). See: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page -> https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Portal:Contents

Notes on missing evidence:
- The provided links_sample for Portal:Contents does not explicitly list https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Outline_of_academic_disciplines, so an explicit in-page verification of Portal:Contents -> Outline_of_academic_disciplines is missing from the merged results.
- The provided links_sample for Outline_of_academic_disciplines does not explicitly list https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Academic_discipline, so an explicit in-page verification of Outline_of_academic_disciplines -> Academic_discipline is also missing from the merged results.

(Visits that produced these pages are in the merged results; the explicit per-page link samples in those results only allow verification of the Main_Page -> Portal:Contents adjacency.)
output.action_summary: Built a 4-page chain starting at Main Page and ending at Academic discipline. Verified one adjacency with evidence: Main Page links to Portal:Contents (shown in Main Page links_sample). Explicit link evidence for Portal:Contents -> Outline_of_academic_disciplines and Outline_of_academic_disciplines -> Academic_discipline is not present in the provided links_sample data, so those adjacencies cannot be independently verified from the merged results.

details.justification: Visiting the terminal node of the chain completes the sequence and provides concrete evidence for the final page.

details.intent: After child visits complete, assemble the ordered chain of URLs discovered and produce one verified adjacency pair with evidence showing URL[i] contains a link to URL[i+1].
target_facts: Ordered array 'chain' of at least 4 URLs found by the visits.
One adjacency verification object: {from_url, to_url, evidence_link_or_snippet} proving the from_url page links to to_url.
details.extraction_plan: Collect 'links' outputs from the visited pages and find the exact anchor evidence (link text or snippet) that shows the adjacency. Present the final chain and the adjacency verification.
details.justification: The task requires not only the chain but also a verified adjacency pair. This think step will synthesize child outputs and produce the required final deliverable.
